# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Ben Carson
subject: Just the beginning
body:
Peter,

As I mentioned last week, I am incredibly proud of the work done
by My Faith Votes in 2016.

Our entire nation has benefited from this effort and we have only
just begun.

While the general election is over on the federal level, there
are many elections for lower offices to be held in the very near
future.

For example, two gubernatorial races will be held in New Jersey
and Virginia in 2017, and voters in cities across the U.S. will
be choosing mayors, specifically in major cities such as Atlanta,
Boston, Buffalo, Charlotte, Cincinnati, Los Angeles, Minneapolis,
San Bernardino, and Seattle.

Christian participation must continue, and grow at every level.
There is still so much to do, and My Faith Votes is committed to
the task of motivating and equipping Christians to vote.

For instance, My Faith Votes is exploring the use of the latest
technology. They are committed to developing new apps to inform
users of their voting opportunities, help them get informed, and
remind them to pray for our leaders.

When informed Christians vote, they bring their beliefs and
convictions into the process of electing leaders. Those elections
have a profound impact on the society and culture in which we
live.

We are beginning to see that play out now on the federal level,
and we need to make sure it happens closer to home as well, in
both our states and local communities.

I hope you'll continue to support the important work of My Faith
Votes as they prepare for this next chapter.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=105

Thank you for everything you've done.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Donate:
myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=105

Copyright © 2016 MyFaithVotes, All rights
reserved

MyFaithVotes | PO Box 1340 | Merrifield, VA
22116

For example, two gubernatorial races will be held in New Jersey and Virginia in 2017, and voters in cities across the U.S. will be choosing mayors, specifically in major cities such as Atlanta, Boston, Buffalo, Charlotte, Cincinnati, Los Angeles, Minneapolis, San Bernardino, and Seattle. Christian participation must continue, and grow at every level. There is still so much to do, and My Faith Votes is committed to the task of motivating and equipping Christians to vote. They are committed to developing new apps to inform users of their voting opportunities, help them get informed, and remind them to pray for our leaders. When informed Christians vote, they bring their beliefs and convictions into the process of electing leaders. Those elections have a profound impact on the society and culture in which we live. We are beginning to see that play out now on the federal level, and we need to make sure it happens closer to home as well, in both our states and local communities.
